content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative refinement framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid self-improvement pipeline that retains Self-Refine’s advantage of no extra training or supervision while addressing its blind spot of single-perspective bias. This hybrid approach would allow an LLM to iteratively refine its output from conflicting problem-solving viewpoints, rather than just correcting flaws within its original output frame of reference.
